summary: Iteration 68 - Onboarding Walkthrough, Quick Launch Flow, Supplier Section & Ad Creative Generation - ALL CORE FEATURES VERIFIED

minor.issue: Requires authentication (401 without token) - correct behavior
minor.note: When authenticated, returns full creative package with product_angles, headlines, tiktok_scripts, facebook_ads, etc.

issues: DialogContent accessibility warnings - missing DialogTitle for screen readers (non-blocking)

BACKEND: Products endpoint returns products for ad generation

BACKEND: Ad creative generation returns full creative package with LLM-generated content (verified with auth)

BACKEND: Store launch endpoint POST /api/stores/launch responds correctly
BACKEND: Connections endpoint GET /api/connections/ works
BACKEND: Products sorted by launch_score for Quick Launch

FRONTEND: Onboarding walkthrough modal appears when localStorage flag NOT set

FRONTEND: Onboarding has 4 progress indicator segments
FRONTEND: Next button visible on onboarding modal
FRONTEND: 'Skip walkthrough' link visible on onboarding modal
FRONTEND: Quick Launch Flow widget appears on dashboard

CODE REVIEW: SupplierSection.jsx has NO external 'Search on AliExpress' link buttons
CODE REVIEW: SupplierSection only shows 'Select Supplier' buttons (internal action)
CODE REVIEW: QuickLaunchFlow.jsx has both 'Make Ads' and 'Skip, I'll do my own' buttons with correct test IDs

verified_features.verification: Modal appears for new users when localStorage 'trendscout_onboarding_complete' is NOT set. Shows 4-step wizard with Next/Back/Skip functionality. Uses COLOR_MAP for dynamic Tailwind classes.
Widget visible on dashboard with product recommendation showing 'Pick This' button. Step progression: 1. Pick a winner → 2. Set up shop → 3. Make ads
Code review confirms 'Make Ads' button (data-testid='quick-launch-ads-btn') and 'Skip, I'll do my own' button (data-testid='quick-launch-skip-ads-btn') exist at lines 282-296
SupplierSection.jsx reviewed - NO href links, NO 'Search on AliExpress' buttons, NO target='_blank' links. Only internal 'Select Supplier' buttons.

POST /api/ad-creatives/generate/{product_id} returns 12KB+ response with product_angles, headlines, tiktok_scripts, facebook_ads, instagram_captions, video_storyboard, shot_list, voiceover_script, email_sequence, ad_budget_recommendation
Dashboard shows 'Live data · Last updated' timestamp with Activity icon
Loads at /settings/connections with all 5 store platforms and 3 ad platforms with Connect buttons

mocked_apis.note: Google Ads integration returns DRAFT status (MOCKED). All other APIs are real.
real_apis: Ad Creative Generation (OpenAI GPT-4.1-mini via Emergent LLM Key)
mocked_apis: Google Ads - returns DRAFT with ad copy for user to paste

critical_code_review_comments: OnboardingWalkthrough.jsx correctly uses COLOR_MAP object for dynamic Tailwind classes (indigo, emerald, purple gradients)
localStorage.setItem('trendscout_onboarding_complete', 'true') called on skip, action, and completion
DashboardPage.jsx line 156-158 correctly shows/hides onboarding based on localStorage check
SupplierSection.jsx imports ExternalLink icon but DOES NOT USE IT - no external link buttons exist
QuickLaunchFlow.jsx has proper data-testid attributes for all buttons
context_for_next_testing_agent: Onboarding walkthrough uses localStorage key 'trendscout_onboarding_complete'. Clear this key to test onboarding appearance. Quick Launch Flow advances through steps on button clicks. Supplier Section correctly shows no external links - only internal 'Select Supplier' buttons. Ad creative generation requires auth token and takes 10-20 seconds due to LLM processing.
